legal_privacy_content_html:
1. Our approach to privacy

At Rimalis Group, we care about your personal privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you use our services.

We comply with applicable data protection laws, including the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

2. Personal data we collect

We may collect the following types of personal data:

  • Contact information: Name, email address, phone number
  • Account information: Username, password (encrypted)
  • User data: Saved favorites, search history, bookings
  • Technical data: IP address, browser type, device information
  • Cookies: Information via cookies (see our cookie policy)

3. How we use your data

Your personal data is used to:

  • Provide and improve our services
  • Manage your account and bookings
  • Send important information about your requests
  • Personalize your experience
  • Send newsletters (with your consent)
  • Fulfill legal obligations

4. Legal basis

We process your personal data based on:

  • Contract: To deliver our services to you
  • Consent: For newsletters and marketing
  • Legal obligation: To comply with legal requirements
  • Legitimate interest: To improve our services

5. Sharing personal data

We never sell your personal data to third parties. However, we may share your data with:

  • Users: When you book a viewing or show interest in a listing
  • Service providers: Who help us run our operations
  • Authorities: If required by law

6. Your rights

You have the right to:

  • Request access to your personal data
  • Request correction of inaccurate data
  • Request deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten")
  • Restrict processing of your data
  • Object to processing
  • Request data portability
  • Withdraw consent at any time

7. Cookies

We use cookies to improve your experience on our website. Read more in our cookie policy.

8. Contact

If you have questions about how we handle your personal data, contact our data protection officer:

support@rimalis.se

08-123 456 79

Birger Jarlsgatan 18, 114 34 Syrien
legal_terms_content_html:
1. Introduction

Welcome to Rimalis Group. By using our website and services, you agree to these terms of use. Please read them carefully before using our services.

Rimalis Group ("we", "us", "our") provides a platform for housing real estate mediation. These terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who wish to use our services.

2. User account

To use certain parts of our services, you need to create an account. You are responsible for:

  • Keeping your login details safe and confidential
  • All activity that occurs under your account
  • Informing us immediately of unauthorized use
  • Providing accurate and up-to-date information

3. Property listings

Information in our property listings is provided by property owners and users. We are not responsible for:

  • The accuracy of listing information
  • The actual condition of the properties
  • Any errors or omissions in listings

We always recommend conducting your own inspection before purchase.

4. Bookings and viewings

When you book a viewing through our platform, you agree that:

  • Your contact details are shared with the responsible user
  • You attend booked viewings on time
  • You notify us in good time if you need to cancel

5. Intellectual property rights

All material on the website, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, images, and software, is our property or the property of our licensors and protected by copyright laws.

6. Limitation of liability

Rimalis Group is not liable for direct or indirect damages arising from the use of our services. Our total liability is limited to the amount you paid for the service during the past 12 months.

7. Changes to terms

We reserve the right to change these terms at any time. Changes are published on this page and take effect immediately. We recommend reviewing the terms regularly.

8. Contact

If you have questions about these terms of use, contact us at:

support@rimalis.se

08-123 456 78
legal_cookies_content_html:
1. What are cookies?

Cookies are small text files stored on your computer, tablet, or mobile device when you visit a website. They are used to make the site function effectively and to provide information to the site owner.

Cookies can be either "persistent" or "session-based". Persistent cookies remain on your device when you go offline, while session cookies are deleted when you close your browser.

2. How we use cookies

We use cookies to:

  • Keep you logged in during your visit
  • Remember your saved favorites
  • Understand how visitors use the website
  • Improve your user experience
  • Show relevant ads and offers
  • Analyze traffic and user behavior

3. Types of cookies we use

Necessary cookies

These cookies are required for the website to function and cannot be turned off in our systems. They are used to save your login details, favorites, and other core functionality.

Performance cookies

These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with the website by collecting anonymous information. This helps us improve site functionality.

Functional cookies

These cookies allow the website to remember your choices (such as language and region) and improve your personalized experience.

Marketing cookies

These cookies are used to show ads relevant to you and your interests. They are also used to limit how many times you see an ad.

4. Third-party cookies

Some cookies come from third-party services that we use on the website:

  • Google Analytics: For traffic analysis
  • HubSpot: For CRM and marketing
  • Hotjar: For user behavior analytics
  • Social media: For sharing features

5. Managing cookies

You can change your cookie settings or remove cookies from your browser at any time. How to do this varies depending on your browser:

  • Chrome: Settings → Privacy and security → Cookies
  • Firefox: Options → Privacy & security → Cookies
  • Safari: Settings → Privacy → Manage website data
  • Edge: Settings → Site permissions → Cookies

Please note that if you block certain cookies, parts of the website may stop working properly.

6. Consent

When you first visit our website, you are asked to accept cookies. You can withdraw your consent at any time by changing your browser settings or contacting us.

7. Contact

If you have questions about our use of cookies, contact us:

support@rimalis.se

08-123 456 80

services_valuation_intro: Get a professional market valuation with a clear pricing strategy, comparables, and a recommended launch plan.
services_valuation_step_1_body: We analyze location, condition, size, and current demand in the area.
services_valuation_step_2_body: We compare with relevant closing prices and active listings in the same segment.
services_valuation_step_3_body: You get a realistic range and recommendation for the best launch timing.
services_valuation_cta_title: Would you like to book a valuation?
services_valuation_cta_body: Send a request and we will get back to you with the next available time slot.
services_sell_intro: We run the full process from pricing strategy and production to viewings, bidding, and contract.
services_sell_block_1_body: Photos, floor plan, copy, and housing exposure in the right channels.
services_sell_block_3_body: Structured bidding process with clear guidance before decisions.
services_sell_cta_body: We review the property, timeline, and target price together.
services_buy_intro: We help you find the right property, analyze the market, and act quickly when the right opportunity appears.
services_buy_block_1_body: Defined budget, requirement profile, and realistic timeline.
services_buy_block_2_body: We match you with public and upcoming listings in the right area.
services_buy_block_3_body: Documentation, risks, and decision support before bidding.
services_buy_block_4_body: Tactical bidding and a secure process through contract signing.
services_buy_cta_body: Write to us and the seller will get back to you.
services_invest_intro: Structured advisory for long-term investments in the housing segment.
services_invest_block_1_body: Market data, yield levels, and risk profile.
services_invest_block_2_body: Identification of properties that match your strategy.
services_invest_cta_body: We book an initial meeting and review setup options.
company_agents_intro: An experienced team with local market knowledge and clear customer focus.
company_agents_card_1_body: Specialized in housing apartments and discreet transactions.
company_agents_card_2_body: Leads listing production and market launch with high precision.
company_agents_card_3_body: Advisory in buying strategy, due diligence, and bidding process.
company_careers_intro: We are new in the market and building the team step by step. Right now we focus on quality, process, and the right competence.
company_careers_block_1_body: People with strong service mindset, ownership, and high professionalism.
company_careers_block_2_body: No open roles published today, but we gladly accept spontaneous applications.
company_careers_cta_body: Tell us briefly about your background and how you want to contribute.
company_press_intro: For media inquiries, interviews, and brand materials.
company_press_block_2_body: Logotypes and press kits are shared on request.
company_press_block_3_body: We normally respond within 1 business day.
